name_local: Catedral de la Encarnación de Málaga

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guide pickup is
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, DON-deh reh-KOH-hen las ow-dyoh-GEE-as?

likely_response.local: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the left.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the unfinished tower is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde veo la torre inacabada?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh VEH-oh lah TOH-rreh ee-nah-kah-BAH-dah?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, en el lado norte.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh EHN EHL LAH-doh NOHR-teh
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, on the north side.

responses.english: At the back, on the north side.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh EHN EHL LAH-doh NOHR-teh
responses.french: Al fondo, en el lado norte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the rooftop tour entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la entrada para la terraza?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah en-TRAH-dah PAH-rah lah teh-RAH-sah?

likely_response.local: Por la puerta del Obispo, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah DEHL oh-BEE-spoh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Through the Bishop's door, on the right.

responses.english: Through the Bishop's door, on the right.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah DEHL oh-BEE-spoh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Por la puerta del Obispo, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to access the choir stalls
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo se accede al coro de la catedral?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿KOH-moh seh ak-SEH-deh al KOH-roh deh lah kah-teh-DRAHL?

likely_response.local: Solo con visita guiada reservada previamente en taquilla.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOH-loh KOHN bee-SEE-tah g-ee-AH-dah reh-sehr-BAH-dah preh-bee-ah-MEHN-teh EHN tah-k-EEL-lah
likely_response.translation_en: Only with a guided tour booked at the ticket office.

responses.english: Only with a guided tour booked at the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: SOH-loh KOHN bee-SEE-tah g-ee-AH-dah reh-sehr-BAH-dah preh-bee-ah-MEHN-teh EHN tah-k-EEL-lah
responses.french: Solo con visita guiada reservada previamente en taquilla.
